fields.helpText: This is a clinic stop used by Mental Health Service within the  PCMM. Clinic stops entered here are used to produce a Mental Health PCMM  report.

This field is used to exclude any Mental Health encounter with the entered Clinic Stop Code as a secondary/credit stop. The Clinic Stop should have a RESTRICTION TYPE(#5) of "Secondary" or "Either" in file CLINIC STOP(#40.7) file. The secondary/credit stop is entered in the CREDIT STOP CODE(#2503) field of the HOSPITAL LOCATION(#44) file.
